description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge on the left side and a main seating area on the right. The sofa features a total of five large, loose back cushions and two wide seat cushions, all with a uniform, plush appearance. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The upholstery is a solid, light color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching. The sofa stands on short, block-style legs that are slightly recessed, giving it a low-profile stance. Its overall design is clean and minimal, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, five loose back cushions, and broad, padded armrests. The upholstery is solid and smooth, with a low-profile, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, five back cushions, two seat cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the thickness of the armrest and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the uniform arrangement of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the main seating area, armrest, and the alignment of the cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five large, loose back cushions arranged in a row, two wide seat cushions, all uniform in size and shape, with a sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, contemporary profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs, slightly recessed under the corners, likely made of wood or metal, with a minimal and unobtrusive appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, supporting five loose cushions, with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
